title: Oversize Turbo Dryer Blower,Car Accessories,Max Instantaneous Thrust 1.60KG,4 Speeds,64MM Super Big Electric Cordless Air Blower for Leaf,Patio Cleaning,Lawn Care & Car Drying (Shining Black)
features: Turbozap Car Dryer Blower: The ultimate solution for achieving a spotlessly clean and dry car in no time. With its powerful 64mm turbo fan and 600W motor, this high-performance blower generates an impressive thrust of 1.6KG, making drying your car effortless. Say goodbye to tedious towel drying and achieve to a quicker, more effective method.Large area blowing, easily dry water damage, blow away snow and leaves quickly and efficiently

4 Speed Adjustments and Portable: With 4 adjustable speed settings, our turbo blower allows you to customize the thrust range from 150g to a whopping 1600g, providing the perfect airflow intensity for drying your car, eliminating water spots, and removing debris. Its portable and user-friendly design ensures maximum convenience. Weighing only 820g, it's lightweight and easy to handle, providing a comfortable grip and smooth maneuverability

Long Battery Life and LED Display: Thanks to the long-lasting 4000mAh battery, companied by a rapid charger for 3-4 hour full replenishment,you can enjoy extended usage time and complete your car drying tasks without interruptions. The built-in LED display keeps you informed about the battery status, voltage, and current, ensuring you never run out of power unexpectedly

Versatile Applications: Suitable for various cleaning tasks such as snow removal, inflating mattresses, yard sweeping, keyboard cleaning, car and motorcycle washing, crevice cleaning, crumb removal from mats, and more, this dust blower is for both residential and commercial outdoor use

Reliable After-Sales Support and Customer Care: Your order includes the Turbozap blower, charger, and user manual. We are confident in the sturdy construction and consistent performance of this portable leaf blower turbo fan. If you have any questions or encounter any issues during use, please feel free to contact us. We will respond within 24 hours to ensure your concerns are resolved promptly and thoroughly.
